subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I beseech God that He may make thee a sign of guidance and a lamp enkindled
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی ابتهل الی الله ان یجعلک ایه الهدی و سراجا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @parents and children; youth; families, @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
